name: Bahama Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Combine very ripe bananas, mashed.
3. In a bowl, combine flour, baking soda, and salt.
4. Cream butter in a mixing bowl.
5. Gradually add sugar and mix well.
6. Add eggs and banana mixture until well blended.
7. In a separate bowl, combine milk and lemon juice (or vanilla extract).
8. Alternately mix the flour mixture into the banana mixture, beginning and ending with dry ingredients.
9. Blend well after each addition.
10. Add nuts if using.
11. Pour batter into a heavily buttered 9 x 5 x 3 inch loaf pan.
12. Bake for one hour or until bread is golden and springs back when touched.
13. Cool in pan for ten minutes.
14. Remove bread from pan and cool completely.
